╭───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ Help · Users List                                                                                                                                                                             │
├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Press Esc to close                                                                                                                                                                            │
│                                                                                                                                                                                               │
│ ── Resource ──                                │ ── General ──                              │ ── Navigation ──                             │ ── Palette ──                                     │
│ Enter / d        open detail (all attributes) │ :       open command palette               │ j / k            cursor down / up            │ :users            Users list                      │
│ Shift+S          sort by STATUS               │ /       incremental search (lists)         │ h / l            scroll columns left / right │ :groups           Groups list                     │
│ Shift+N          sort by NAME (login)         │ ?       this help                          │ gg / G           top / bottom                │ :group-rules      Group Rules list                │
│ Shift+L          sort by LAST LOGIN           │ a       resource action menu (issue #175)  │ Ctrl-d / Ctrl-u  half-page down / up         │ :policies         Policies (with type picker)     │
│ Shift+C          sort by CREATED / CHANGED    │ Esc     cancel mode / close overlay        │ Ctrl-f / Ctrl-b  page down / up              │ :apps             Apps (with type picker)         │
│ :reset-password  send reset-password email    │ q       close screen / quit (with confirm) │                                              │ :authenticator    Authenticators (factor methods) │
│ :unlock          clear LOCKED_OUT state       │ Ctrl-c  soft quit (tail confirm)           │                                              │ :logs             System Log                      │
│ :reset-mfa       remove enrolled MFA factors  │ Ctrl-l  force redraw                       │                                              │ :saml-app         SAML apps                       │
│                                               │ R       refresh (cache invalidate)         │                                              │ :oidc-app         OIDC apps                       │
│                                               │ :quit   quit ota                           │                                              │ :okta-sign-on     Okta Sign-On policies           │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :password-policy  Password policies               │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :reset-password   trigger Reset Password          │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :unlock           Unlock the selected user        │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :reset-mfa        Reset MFA factors               │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :unmask <fld>     reveal a masked detail field    │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :mask             re-mask all PII fields          │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :help             open this overlay               │
│                                               │                                            │                                              │ :quit             quit ota                        │
│                                                                                                                                                                                               │
│ <Esc> close · </> filter                                                                                                                                                                      │
╰───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
